entities.name: VERMICOMPOSTING
entities.description: Biological degradation and conversion of agricultural or herbal wastes by earthworms and microorganisms

entities.description: Organisms used in vermicomposting to degrade wastes

entities.name: MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Organisms involved in vermicomposting and plant growth promotion

entities.name: VERMICOMPOST
entities.description: Material prepared from herbals via vermicomposting used to benefit crop plants

entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that benefit from the application of vermicompost and PGP microorganisms

entities.name: NUTRIENT MOBILIZATION
entities.description: The ability of plants to mobilize and acquire nutrients

entities.description: The growth process of plants promoted by PGP microorganisms

entities.description: Microorganisms that promote plant growth and yield

entities.description: Agricultural practice utilizing PGP microorganisms for long-term viability

entities.description: Direct means of promoting plant growth by PGP microorganisms

entities.description: Direct means of promoting plant growth by PGP microorganisms

entities.description: Direct means of promoting plant growth by PGP microorganisms

entities.description: Characteristics of Actinobacteria that promote plant growth
